name: Ebidramon

signature_move.name: Twin Neptune
signature_move.description: Swoops down on the opponent with its two pincers.

description: A nonconformist of the Dramon-type which has a tough, shrimp-like shell and gigantic pincers. If one is misled by its outward appearance and makes light of Ebidramon, they will become prey of the offensive ability characteristic of the Dramon-type. Its Special Move is swooping down on them with its two pincers ( Twin Neptune ).
